prompt: A realistic smartphone screenshot of the ChatGPT mobile app in Japanese on an Android device, shown full screen in portrait orientation with a clean light theme. The status bar at the top shows the time 19:27, network and battery icons, and 54% battery. The header has a back-style menu icon on the left, a rounded tab labeled ChatGPT, and 2 icons on the right: an edit pencil icon and a vertical three-dot menu. In the chat area, include 1 user message bubble in Japanese reading "インフルエンサーで港区飲みしてそうなリアルな女子". Below it, show the assistant status text "画像が作成されました" and then 1 generated image card with rounded corners. The generated image is a photorealistic night restaurant portrait of a glamorous young Japanese woman seated indoors by a window with Tokyo Tower visible outside, wearing a black spaghetti-strap dress, long wavy brown hair, a delicate necklace, and a bracelet, leaning her face on one hand at a candlelit dinner table with a wine glass in the foreground; the setting feels upscale, dimly lit, and influencer-like, with a mirror behind her reflecting the back of her head and the city view. Blur or mosaic the woman’s face for privacy. Beneath the image, show 5 action icons in a row: copy, thumbs up, thumbs down, share, and more. At the bottom, include the message input bar with a plus icon on the left, placeholder text "ChatGPT に返信する", a microphone icon, and a circular voice button on the right. Also show the Android navigation bar with 3 controls at the very bottom. Keep the overall composition exactly like a casual app screenshot, minimal, spacious, and authentic.
